changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Add person_attribute.value required by the current OpenMRS JPA mapping.

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Add unquoted person_attribute.value for Hibernate on H2 PostgreSQL mode.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE person_attribute ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS value VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '' NOT NULL

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Backfill legacy person_attribute values when only value_reference was populated.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE person_attribute SET value = LEFT(value_reference, 50) WHERE (value IS NULL OR value = '') AND value_reference IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Keep H2 aligned with the PersonAttribute JPA mapping used by the static core boot tests.

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Ensure H2 has the PersonAttribute value column even when Liquibase table preconditions miss the default schema.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS person_attribute ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS value VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '' NOT NULL

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Ensure PostgreSQL has the PersonAttribute value column required by the JPA mapping.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS person_attribute ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS value VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '' NOT NULL

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Backfill PersonAttribute value from value_reference when both columns exist.
changeSet.sql: DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'person_attribute' AND column_name = 'value' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'person_attribute' AND column_name = 'value_reference' ) THEN UPDATE person_attribute SET value = LEFT(value_reference, 50) WHERE (value IS NULL OR value = '') AND value_reference IS NOT NULL; END IF; END $$;

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Add FHIR2 patient identifier system metadata table for static module boot.

changeSet.author: gonzalo g.
changeSet.comment: Port SIH Salus content changelog: allow long OCL concept names.

changeSet.author: gonzalo g.
changeSet.comment: Keep H2 aligned with the SIH Salus content concept_name length change.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS concept_name ALTER COLUMN name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Advance PostgreSQL owned sequences after legacy seed data with explicit primary keys.
